title: The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Admission) Act, 2006
full_text: The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Admission) Act, 2006 केन्‍द्रीय शिक्षा संस्‍था (प्रवेश में आरक्षण) अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200705 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 2007-01-03 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Admission) Act, 2006 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय शिक्षा संस्‍था (प्रवेश में आरक्षण) अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reservation in admission of the students belonging to the Scheduled Castes, the Scheduled Tribes and the Other Backward Classes of citizens, to certain Central Educational Institutions established, maintained or aided by the Central Government, and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 03-01-2007 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Admission) Act, 2006 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Reservation of seats in Central Educational Institutions. Section 4. Act not to apply in certain cases. Section 5. Mandatory increase of seats. Section 6. Reservation of seats in admissions to begin in calendar year, 2008. Section 7. Laying of notifications before Parliament. Schedule 1.
